children.value:
(CH-CHA, 2005–2024) from its external
location, optionally keeps a chosen list of columns, extracts all half-hourly
records for the year
, and saves the subset as Parquet under

This 2024 subset provides the independent reference fluxes used alongside the
time-lag

from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

from diive.core.io.files import load_parquet, save_parquet

NB_START = datetime.now()  # notebook start time (reported in the last cell)

# Source: final flux product FP2025.3 (external location, outside this repo).
INFILE = Path(
    r"F:\CURRENT\CHA_TIMELAG-COMPARISON_2021\2-FLUXRUN"
    r"\00-CH-CHA_FP2025.3_2005-2024_81.1_FLUXES_M15_MGMT_L4.2_NEE_GPP_RECO_LE_H_FN2O_FCH4_20250516.csv"
    r"\CH-CHA_FP2025.3_2005-2024_81.1_FLUXES_M15_MGMT_L4.2_NEE_GPP_RECO_LE_H_FN2O_FCH4_20250516.parquet"
)

OUTDIR = Path("../data/04-flux-product-2025.3_subset_2024")
OUTDIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

YEAR = 2024  # year to extract
OUTNAME = "CH-CHA_FP2025.3_subset_2024"  # output filename (without extension)

df = load_parquet(filepath=str(INFILE))
print(f"Loaded {df.shape[0]} rows x {df.shape[1]} cols")
print(f"Full range: {df.index.min()} -> {df.index.max()}")
print("\nAvailable columns:")
print(df.columns.tolist())

# Columns to keep (by name). Empty list = keep all columns.
KEEP_COLS = [
    "TIMESINCE_MGMT_FERT_MIN_FOOTPRINT", "TIMESINCE_MGMT_FERT_ORG_FOOTPRINT",
    "TIMESINCE_MGMT_GRAZING_FOOTPRINT", "TIMESINCE_MGMT_MOWING_FOOTPRINT",
    "TIMESINCE_MGMT_SOILCULTIVATION_FOOTPRINT", "TIMESINCE_MGMT_SOWING_FOOTPRINT",
    "TIMESINCE_MGMT_PESTICIDE_HERBICIDE_FOOTPRINT", "TIMESINCE_PREC_RAIN_TOT_GF1_0.5_1",
    # SWC
    "SWC_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H",
    ".SWC_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-24", ".SWC_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-18",
    ".SWC_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-12", ".SWC_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-6",
    # TS
    "TS_GF1_0.04_1_gfXG_MEAN3H",
    ".TS_GF1_0.04_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-24", ".TS_GF1_0.04_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-18",
    ".TS_GF1_0.04_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-12", ".TS_GF1_0.04_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-6",
    "TS_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H",
    ".TS_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-24", ".TS_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-18",
    ".TS_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-12", ".TS_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-6",
    "TS_GF1_0.4_1_gfXG_MEAN3H",
    ".TS_GF1_0.4_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-24", ".TS_GF1_0.4_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-18",
    ".TS_GF1_0.4_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-12", ".TS_GF1_0.4_1_gfXG_MEAN3H-6",
    # PRECIP
    "PREC_RAIN_TOT_GF1_0.5_1_MEAN3H",
    ".PREC_RAIN_TOT_GF1_0.5_1_MEAN3H-24", ".PREC_RAIN_TOT_GF1_0.5_1_MEAN3H-18",
    ".PREC_RAIN_TOT_GF1_0.5_1_MEAN3H-12", ".PREC_RAIN_TOT_GF1_0.5_1_MEAN3H-6",
    "TS_GF1_0.04_1_gfXG",
    "TS_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG",
    "TS_GF1_0.4_1_gfXG",
    "SWC_GF1_0.15_1_gfXG",
    "PREC_RAIN_TOT_GF1_0.5_1",
    "USTAR"
]

if KEEP_COLS:
    present = [c for c in KEEP_COLS if c in df.columns]
    missing = [c for c in KEEP_COLS if c not in df.columns]
    if missing:
        print(f"WARNING: {len(missing)} requested column(s) not found: {missing}")
    df = df[present]
    print(f"Kept {df.shape[1]} column(s): {present}")
else:
    print(f"KEEP_COLS empty -> keeping all {df.shape[1]} columns")

subset = df.loc[df.index.year == YEAR]
print(f"{YEAR} subset: {subset.shape[0]} rows x {subset.shape[1]} cols")
print(f"Range: {subset.index.min()} -> {subset.index.max()}")
